text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Don't be shy! Does a photograph with<n>the great
T.M. Opera O tickle your<n>fancy?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I can emulate a graceful angel<n>descending from
the heavens—a water<n>spirit jovially playing with
mermaids...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No matter the role you give me, I shall<n>embody it!
For a limited time only!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well? Don't rush me all at once! Those<n>who wish
to partake, form a line!
